title: Peek-a-Boo Seasons with Zuri
synopsis: Join Zuri as she plays peek-a-boo with nature through the changing seasons, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Zuri? Here she is behind the spring flowers!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes peeks out from behind pink cherry blossoms and yellow daffodils in a spring garden with soft pastel colors
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind colorful spring flowers

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Zuri? There she is under the summer leaves!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes sits under a large green oak tree with bright summer sunshine and vibrant green grass all around
illustration.alt: Zuri sitting under a big green summer tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Zuri? She's playing in the autumn leaves!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes tosses orange, red, and golden autumn leaves in the air with warm autumn colors surrounding the same tree scene
illustration.alt: Zuri playing in colorful fall leaves

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Zuri? Here she is making snow angels in winter!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes lies in white snow making snow angels under the same tree now bare with cool winter blues and whites
illustration.alt: Zuri making snow angels in winter

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Every season Zuri finds new ways to play!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes stands in the center with four seasonal scenes around her showing the same location in spring, summer, autumn, and winter
illustration.alt: Zuri surrounded by all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What was Zuri hiding behind in spring?
questions.explanation: Zuri was hiding behind beautiful spring flowers in the garden!

questions.question: What was Zuri making in the snow?
questions.explanation: Zuri was making snow angels by lying in the white winter snow!

questions.question: What colors are autumn leaves?
questions.explanation: Autumn leaves turn beautiful warm colors like orange, red, and golden yellow!
